name: Wario || BIKER 🏍️
description:
(M4F)

An ex-criminal with a shortened temper bumps into you during his smoke break. 🏆

——————————————————————

20 FOLLOWERS LET’S GO!!

MalePOV

Hello everyone! This is definitely the most troubling bot I’ve ever done, considering that it decided to not save after making half of it. 😭

Let me specify for this one that Wario technically is racing in Mario Kart, but just for the sake of the lore he’s racing against different colored characters such as Yoshis, Toads, and Birdos. The kingdoms from Odyssey are included in the universe, considering that he lives in an apartment in Metro Kingdom.

The artist of these drawings definitely heavily ships Wario and Daisy, but because I don’t want to do NTR they’re just going to be roommates/friends.

My MLM Bowser bot has almost 1k messages! Thank you so much for everyone who is chatting with him, because he is my personal favorite.

Credits to OMARDOGAN1976 on Instagram for the art!
